scripts.obfuscate:setup: javascript-obfuscator setup-theme.src.js --output setup-theme.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array-encoding base64 --unicode-escape-sequence true
scripts.obfuscate:theme: javascript-obfuscator themebuilder.src.js --output themebuilder.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array-encoding base64 --unicode-escape-sequence true
scripts.obfuscate: npm run obfuscate:setup && npm run obfuscate:theme
